# `/feature` (Enable architecture features)

The **`/feature`** option enables specific architecture features for code generation. Select the target platform you're working with to see **`/feature`** options for that platform.

- [`/feature` (ARM64)](feature-arm64.md)<sup>17.10</sup>

- [`/feature` (x64)](feature-x64.md)<sup>14.51</sup>

<sup>17.10</sup> This option is available starting in Visual Studio 2022 version 17.10.\
<sup>14.51</sup> This option ships with MSVC Build Tools version 14.51. Available as part of Visual Studio starting with version 18.6.
